message:
Fix bugs in enhanced transcript components

- Remove unused useSpring import from enhanced-hero.tsx
- Remove unused useEffect import from enhanced-stats.tsx
- Move StatItem interface outside component for efficiency
- Fix broken search functionality in enhanced-timeline.tsx
  - Search now actually filters messages by content and tool names
  - Shows "no results" message when search has no matches
  - Hides sections with no matching messages during search
- Fix memory leak in MessageCard handleCopy (cleanup timeout on unmount)
- Remove unused idx variable and containerRef

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Handles mixed code/text content from Claude responses.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:45:14.358981753-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:02:19.174837935-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:02:19.174837935-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented MessageContent with code block parsing and syntax highlighting","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8n2","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-73l","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:48:45.001710539-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oo5","title":"Build sharing dialog and public share page","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-gho. ## Task Build sharing dialog and public share page UI. ## Components ### ShareDialog Modal dialog for creating/managing share links. Triggered from: - Prompt detail page - Pack detail page - Skill detail page - Library item menu Sections: 1. **Make Public** (if private) - Publish to Swap Meet option - Visibility explainer 2. **Share Link** - Generated link with copy button - Password toggle (optional) - Expiration dropdown (never, 7d, 30d, custom) - View count display - Revoke link button 3. **Social Share** - Twitter share button - LinkedIn share button - Copy link button ### /share/[linkCode] (Public Share Page) Page shown when visiting share link. Layout: - Content preview (read-only) - Author info (if public author chose to show) - "Save to Library" CTA (requires login) - "Fork to My Library" option - "Sign up for Premium" CTA (if not logged in) Features: - Password prompt (if protected) - Expired link handling - View tracking - Mobile-friendly layout ### ShareManagement Section in settings/library for managing shares. Features: - List all active share links - View count per link - Quick copy link - Edit settings - Revoke links ## Password Protection Flow 1. Visit share link 2. If password protected, show password input 3. Submit password 4. On success, show content 5. Works with the redact and validate pipeline.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8ou","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-5jx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:49:00.660994399-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oxm","title":"Integration Tests: CLI Offline Mode","description":"## Task Create integration tests for CLI offline mode and auto-update behavior. ## Why This Matters - Offline mode is a key reliability feature - Auto-update must not break auth ## Test Scenarios 1. ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:50.043400843-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:50.043400843-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oxm","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-uw7z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:50.049354133-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oxm","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hiff","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:50.052109496-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oxm","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:50.054639455-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8s6","title":"Implement jfp render command with variable injection","description":"Part 6.7 of PLAN. Full message display with: header (avatar, name, timestamp), optional highlight annotation, extended thinking toggle with collapsible content, message content with MessageContent renderer, expandable ToolCall displays showing input/output with syntax highlighting. Adapts brennerbot patterns for Claude Code transcripts.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:44:52.884847468-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:05:17.098107229-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:05:17.098107229-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented MessageDetail with header, thinking toggle, and expandable tool calls display","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8zj","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cke","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:48:46.811802119-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8zj","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8n2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:48:46.841278059-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-938","title":"Implement markdown export (export/markdown.ts)","description":"Part 4.1 of PLAN. generatePromptMarkdown(prompt) creates formatted markdown with: title, description, category, tags, content, whenToUse, tips sections. generateBulkMarkdown(prompts) creates combined file. Used by CLI export command and web download buttons. Frontmatter optional.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:47:33.78215326-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:25.589534511-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:25.589534511-05:00","close_reason":"Implementation complete and verified with type checking","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-938","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-x21","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:49:42.031231959-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} @@ -150,6 +151,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cke","title":"Create transcript type definitions (lib/transcript/types.ts)","description":"Part 10.4 of PLAN. Define: TranscriptMessage (id, type, timestamp, content, toolCalls, thinking, model), ToolCall (id, name, input, output, duration, success), TranscriptSection (id, title, summary, startIndex, endIndex, tags), ProcessedTranscript (meta with sessionId/stats, sections, messages, highlights), TranscriptHighlight (messageId, type, annotation). Types enable structured transcript display.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:44:49.25969293-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:34:39.520857514-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:34:39.520857514-05:00","close_reason":"Added transcript data model types in apps/web/src/lib/transcript/types.ts"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cmd","title":"Create @jeffreysprompts/core shared package -- Background: The core package is the single source of truth for all prompt definitions, types, search engine, and export functions. Both web and CLI import from core - never from each other. This clean separation enables future publishing to npm and extensions (VS Code, MCP). TypeScript-native approach means prompts ARE code with full type safety.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:26:52.129827589-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:16.791813702-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:16.791813702-05:00","close_reason":"Core package complete: types, registry, search (BM25/tokenize/synonyms), export (skills/markdown/json), template (render/variables) all implemented and type-checking passes","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cmd","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9ho","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:36:35.377112261-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cs7","title":"Build RelatedPrompts component for permalink pages","description":"**Details:** - Shows related prompts based on tag overlap + BM25 similarity - Displayed at bottom of /prompts/[id] pages - Click navigates to related prompt - Limited to 4-6 suggestions **Implementation:** ```typescript // apps/web/src/components/related-prompts.tsx interface RelatedPromptsProps { promptId: string; limit?: number; } export function RelatedPrompts({ promptId, limit = 5 }: RelatedPromptsProps) { const related = useMemo(() => { const current = getPrompt(promptId); if (!current) return []; // Score by tag overlap + BM25 on title/description const candidates = prompts.filter(p => p.id !== promptId); const scored = candidates.map(p => ({ prompt: p, score: calculateTagOverlap(current.tags, p.tags) + bm25Score(current.title + ' ' + current.description, p) })); return scored .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score) .slice(0, limit) .map(s => s.prompt); }, [promptId, limit]); if (related.length === 0) return null; return (

Related Prompts

{related.map(p => ( ))}
); } ``` **Scoring Algorithm:** - Tag overlap: +1 point per shared tag - BM25: Score title+description against current prompt - Weighted sum: 60% tags, 40% BM25 **Location:** apps/web/src/components/related-prompts.tsx **Reasoning:** Related prompts increase engagement and help users discover more content. Tag overlap ensures topical relevance while BM25 adds semantic similarity.","notes":"Added RelatedPrompts component and wired into prompt permalink content","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:35:23.87036225-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T16:41:34.215887393-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T16:41:34.2158915-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cs7","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-z16","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:54.781837612-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ctt5","title":"Implement CLI configuration file management","description":"## Task Implement CLI configuration file support for JeffreysPrompts CLI. ## Scope CLI client-side behavior; belongs in the public repo. Depends on Premium CLI auth and sync flows for endpoint defaults. ## Features - Create ~/.jeffreysprompts/config.json on first run - Store API endpoint, auth tokens, preferences - Support project-local .jeffreysprompts.json - Environment variable overrides - Config validation on load ## Configuration Options ```json { "apiEndpoint": "https://api.jeffreysprompts.com", "defaultVisibility": "private", "syncOnSave": true, "offlineMode": false, "theme": "auto", "editor": "code", "outputFormat": "pretty" } ``` ## CLI Commands - jfp config list - Show current config - jfp config get - Get config value - jfp config set - Set config value - jfp config reset - Reset to defaults - jfp config path - Show config file location ## Logging Requirements - Log config resolution order (project -> user -> env -> defaults) - Log validation failures with actionable hints - Log config migration steps when schema changes ## Success Criteria - Config persists across sessions - Project config overrides global - Env vars take precedence - Invalid config handled gracefully ## Origin Moved from `jeffreysprompts_premium-rh0g`. ","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:05.114652797-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:05.114652797-05:00"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","title":"Integration Tests: Performance & SEO Outputs","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-k76l. ## Task Create integration tests for SEO outputs, performance budgets, and image optimization. ## Why This Matters - SEO artifacts must be correct for discoverability - Performance regressions hurt conversion - Image optimization impacts speed and cost ## Test Scenarios ### SEO Outputs 1. Generate sitemap and validate URLs 2. Ensure robots.txt references sitemap 3. Validate canonical tags for key pages ### Performance Budgets 1. Bundle size within configured budget 2. Lighthouse/Core Web Vitals thresholds met in CI mode 3. Fail with actionable bundle diff ### Image Optimization 1. Verify optimized image response headers 2. Ensure CDN caching headers present 3. Confirm size reduction for large images ## Logging Requirements - Log bundle size metrics - Log Core Web Vitals scores - Record sitemap URL counts and invalid entries ## Files to Create - tests/integration/seo/sitemap.test.ts - tests/integration/perf/bundle-budget.test.ts - tests/integration/perf/image-optimization.test.ts ## Success Criteria - SEO artifacts valid - Perf budgets enforced - Image optimization verified ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:29:38.765619126-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:29:38.765619126-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-qg15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:30:01.474839309-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xd0s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:30:01.600226874-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-drns","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:30:01.724327452-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cwcj","title":"Add share_links schema tables","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-318. ## Task Add share_links table for private link sharing of content. ## Schema Definition ```typescript export const shareLinks = pgTable("share_links", { id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(), userId: uuid("user_id").notNull().references(() => users.id), // What is being shared contentType: text("content_type", { enum: ["user_prompt", "prompt_pack", "skill", "collection"] }).notNull(), contentId: uuid("content_id").notNull(), // The shareable link code (appears in URL) linkCode: text("link_code").notNull().unique(), // Optional security passwordHash: text("password_hash"), // bcrypt hash if password protected // Expiration expiresAt: timestamp("expires_at", { withTimezone: true }), // Stats viewCount: integer("view_count").default(0), // Status isActive: boolean("is_active").default(true).notNull(), // Timestamps createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(), }, (table) => [ index("idx_share_links_user").on(table.userId), index("idx_share_links_code").on(table.linkCode), index("idx_share_links_content").on(table.contentType, table.contentId), ]); export const shareLinkViews = pgTable("share_link_views", { id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(), linkId: uuid("link_id").notNull().references(() => shareLinks.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }), // Viewer info (optional - null for anonymous) viewerId: uuid("viewer_id").references(() => users.id), // For analytics without PII ipHash: text("ip_hash"), // SHA-256 of IP for unique visitor counting userAgent: text("user_agent"), viewedAt: timestamp("viewed_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(), }, (table) => [ index("idx_share_link_views_link").on(table.linkId), ]); ``` ## Link Code Generation - 12 character alphanumeric (base62) - Example: "x7KmN2pQ4rYz" - Not sequential/guessable - Check for collisions on insert ## Public URLs - /share/{linkCode} - view shared content - No auth required to view - Optional password prompt ## Notes - viewCount is denormalized; increment on each view - isActive allows "revoking" without deleting - ipHash allows counting unique visitors without storing IPs ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:17:48.536748178-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:17:48.536748178-05:00"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-czs","title":"Implement jfp bundles and bundle show -- Details: bundles lists all bundles with prompt counts. bundle show displays description, included prompts, workflow, when-to-use. --bundle flag on install creates combined skill.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:22.127698832-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T16:58:30.639704239-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T16:58:30.639704239-05:00","close_reason":"CLI bundles + install --bundle already implemented","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-czs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-wxb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:44.410701829-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} @@ -294,6 +296,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rnm","title":"Implement useLocalStorage hook","description":"**Details:** - Generic hook for localStorage persistence - SSR-safe (handles hydration) - Type-safe with generics - Used by: basket, theme, variable inputs, preferences **Implementation:** ```typescript // apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts 'use client'; export function useLocalStorage(key: string, initialValue: T) { // State to store our value const [storedValue, setStoredValue] = useState(() => { if (typeof window === 'undefined') return initialValue; try { const item = localStorage.getItem(key); return item ? JSON.parse(item) : initialValue; } catch { return initialValue; } }); // Persist to localStorage on change useEffect(() => { if (typeof window === 'undefined') return; try { localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(storedValue)); } catch (error) { console.warn('Failed to save to localStorage:', error); } }, [key, storedValue]); return [storedValue, setStoredValue] as const; } ``` **SSR Handling:** - Initial render uses provided default - useEffect syncs with localStorage after hydration - Prevents hydration mismatch errors **Location:** apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts **Reasoning:** Many features need persistent state (basket, theme, variable inputs). Centralizing localStorage logic in a hook ensures consistent behavior and SSR safety.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:35.714509321-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:46.164609393-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:46.164609393-05:00","close_reason":"Added apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts SSR-safe localStorage hook"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ro6f","title":"Build content reporting flow","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-xlo. ## Task Build content reporting flow for community moderation. ## User Flow ### Report Button - Flag icon on all public content - Tooltip: "Report this content" - Only visible to logged-in users - Hidden on own content ### Report Dialog On click, opens modal: 1. **Reason Selection** (required) - Spam or misleading content - Inappropriate or offensive - Copyright violation - Contains harmful content - Other 2. **Details** (optional) - Textarea for additional context - Max 500 characters 3. **Submit** - "Report" button - Loading state - Success toast: "Report submitted. We'll review within 24 hours." ### Database Schema ```typescript export const contentReports = pgTable("content_reports", { id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(), reporterId: uuid("reporter_id").notNull().references(() => users.id), contentType: text("content_type").notNull(), contentId: uuid("content_id").notNull(), reason: text("reason").notNull(), details: text("details"), status: text("status", { enum: ["pending", "reviewed", "actioned", "dismissed"] }).default("pending"), reviewedBy: uuid("reviewed_by"), reviewedAt: timestamp("reviewed_at"), action: text("action"), // warn, remove, ban adminNotes: text("admin_notes"), createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(), }, (table) => [ index("idx_reports_status").on(table.status), index("idx_reports_content").on(table.contentType, table.contentId), ]); ``` ### API Endpoint POST /api/reports Request: { contentType, contentId, reason, details } Response: { success: true } ### Rate Limiting - Max 10 reports per user per day - Prevent report spam ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:14.231948001-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:14.231948001-05:00"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rq8","title":"Define transcript types (lib/transcript/types.ts) -- Details: TranscriptMessage { id, type, timestamp, content, toolCalls[], thinking, model }. ToolCall { id, name, input, output, success }. TranscriptSection { id, title, summary, startIndex, endIndex, tags }. ProcessedTranscript { meta, sections, messages, highlights }.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:14.981971239-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:34:46.358451936-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:34:46.358451936-05:00","close_reason":"Duplicate of jeffreysprompts.com-cke; types implemented"} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rqbs","title":"Unit Tests: CLI Config & Offline Cache","description":"## Task Create unit tests for CLI configuration parsing and offline cache behavior. ## Why This Matters - CLI settings must persist across runs - Offline mode should be predictable and safe ## Test Scenarios 1. Config file read/write roundtrip 2. Invalid config falls back to defaults 3. Project config overrides user config 4. Env var overrides apply correctly 5. Offline cache stores and retrieves prompts 6. Cache eviction respects size limits 7. Cache schema migration retains data ## Logging Requirements - Log config paths and fallback reasons per test case - Record cache hit/miss/eviction stats - Emit structured test logs for failures with full context ## Files to Create - tests/unit/cli/config.test.ts - tests/unit/cli/offline-cache.test.ts ## Success Criteria - Config handling stable - Offline cache deterministic - Failures provide actionable logs ## Origin Moved from `jeffreysprompts_premium-9gvm`. ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.443212341-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.443212341-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rqbs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ctt5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.449063799-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rqbs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.452349312-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rt6z","title":"Task: Export command tests with real temp file output","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:45:02.879245521-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T19:06:51.840994251-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T19:06:51.840994251-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented real temp directory tests in skills.test.ts, registry.test.ts, export.test.ts. Keep both repos in sync. ## Task Implement mobile-first responsive design for all pages. ## Why This Matters From README: "We optimize for an elite UX across desktop and mobile." ## Responsive Breakpoints Using Tailwind's default breakpoints: - `sm`: 640px (large phones) - `md`: 768px (tablets) - `lg`: 1024px (laptops) - `xl`: 1280px (desktops) - `2xl`: 1536px (large desktops) ## Mobile-First Patterns ### 1. Navigation - Hamburger menu on mobile - Slide-out drawer for navigation - Bottom tab bar for primary actions - Collapsible header on scroll ### 2. Content Layout - Single column on mobile - Multi-column grid on desktop - Cards stack vertically on mobile - Touch-friendly spacing (min 44px targets) ### 3. Forms - Full-width inputs on mobile - Stack labels above inputs - Large touch targets for buttons - Keyboard-optimized input types ### 4. Tables - Horizontal scroll with sticky column - Or convert to card layout on mobile - Collapsible rows for detail ### 5. Modals - Full-screen on mobile - Slide-up sheet pattern - Easy dismiss with swipe - Fixed footer for actions ## Component Updates ### Mobile Header ```typescript // src/components/layout/mobile-header.tsx export function MobileHeader() { return (
); } ``` ### Mobile Navigation ```typescript // src/components/layout/mobile-nav.tsx export function MobileNav({ isOpen, onClose }: Props) { return (
{/* Navigation items */}
); } ``` ### Responsive Grid ```typescript
{items.map(item => )}
``` ## Touch Interactions - Swipe gestures for navigation - Pull-to-refresh where appropriate - Long-press for context menus - Haptic feedback (where supported) ## Performance on Mobile - Lazy load images below fold - Reduce initial bundle for mobile - Optimize for slower connections - Respect data saver mode ## Testing Requirements - Test on actual devices (iOS Safari, Android Chrome) - Test in Playwright mobile viewport - Test touch interactions - Test with slow network throttling ## Files to Create - `src/components/layout/mobile-header.tsx` - `src/components/layout/mobile-nav.tsx` - `src/components/layout/mobile-tab-bar.tsx` - `src/components/ui/swipe-sheet.tsx` - `src/hooks/use-mobile.ts` ## Success Criteria - All pages usable on mobile - Touch targets are adequate size - Navigation is intuitive - Performance is acceptable on 3G - No horizontal overflow ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:35.477171694-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:35.477171694-05:00"} @@ -352,6 +355,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xjfe","title":"Implement trending and discovery algorithm","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-8f3t. ## Task Create algorithm for surfacing trending and recommended content. ## Why This Matters - Help users discover great content - Reward quality contributors - Drive engagement - Fresh content on homepage ## Trending Signals ### Engagement Metrics - Views (weighted by recency) - Saves/bookmarks - Uses (copied/exported) - Shares - Ratings (weighted average) ### Quality Signals - Creator reputation - Content completeness - Has description - Has examples - Tagged appropriately ### Freshness - Recent content boosted - Decay over time - Evergreen content exceptions ## Algorithm ### Trending Score ```typescript function calculateTrendingScore(prompt: Prompt, window: Duration): number { const viewScore = weightedViews(prompt.views, window) * 1.0; const saveScore = prompt.saveCount * 3.0; const useScore = prompt.useCount * 2.0; const shareScore = prompt.shareCount * 2.5; const ratingScore = (prompt.avgRating - 3) * prompt.ratingCount * 0.5; const engagementScore = viewScore + saveScore + useScore + shareScore + ratingScore; // Quality multiplier (0.5 - 1.5) const qualityMultiplier = calculateQualityScore(prompt); // Freshness decay const freshnessDecay = Math.pow(0.95, daysSinceCreated(prompt)); return engagementScore * qualityMultiplier * freshnessDecay; } ``` ### Personalized Recommendations - Based on user's saved content - Based on viewing history - Similar to liked items - From followed creators - Collaborative filtering (users like you) ## Implementation ### Batch Calculation - Run hourly for trending - Cache results - Incremental updates ### Database ```typescript export const trendingPrompts = pgTable('trending_prompts', { promptId: uuid('prompt_id').references(() => userPrompts.id).primaryKey(), score: numeric('score').notNull(), rank: integer('rank'), period: text('period'), // daily, weekly, monthly calculatedAt: timestamp('calculated_at').defaultNow(), }); ``` ## Discovery Pages - /explore - Browse trending - /explore/new - Recent high-quality - /explore/top - All-time best - /for-you - Personalized ## Files to Create - src/lib/discovery/trending.ts - src/lib/discovery/recommendations.ts - src/app/api/cron/calculate-trending/route.ts - src/app/(app)/explore/page.tsx ## Success Criteria - Trending reflects actual engagement - Fresh content surfaces - Quality content rewarded - Personalization improves discovery ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:19:31.62171395-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:19:31.62171395-05:00"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xr7y","title":"E2E Tests: Landing Page & Marketing","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-xua. ## Task Create comprehensive E2E tests for landing page and marketing pages. ## Test Scenarios ### Landing Page 1. Hero section renders 2. Feature highlights display 3. Pricing section visible 4. CTA buttons work 5. Navigation links work 6. Mobile responsive layout ### SEO & Meta 7. Page title correct 8. Meta description present 9. Open Graph tags present 10. Canonical URLs set 11. Structured data (JSON-LD) ### Conversion Flow 12. CTA links to signup 13. Pricing page accessible 14. Free tier comparison visible 15. Premium benefits clear ### Performance 16. LCP within threshold 17. CLS minimal 18. FID acceptable 19. Images optimized ## Files to Create - e2e/marketing/landing.spec.ts - e2e/marketing/seo.spec.ts - e2e/marketing/conversion.spec.ts - e2e/lib/marketing-helpers.ts ## Success Criteria - Landing page fully functional - SEO tags correct - Performance acceptable - Conversion paths clear ","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:14.355704982-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:14.355704982-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xr7y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-30k9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:36.454709845-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xr7y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-fbcl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:36.584610898-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xz6k","title":"Task: Registry loader tests with real temp cache files","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:44:27.553305621-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T19:06:57.293672978-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T19:06:57.293672978-05:00","close_reason":"Registry loader tests now use real temp directories via JFP_HOME env var","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xz6k","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-5mm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:54:52.53686937-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","title":"Implement CLI offline mode and auto-update","description":"## Task Add offline caching and auto-update mechanism to the jfp CLI. ## Why This Matters - CLI users work offline sometimes - Need access to synced prompts - Auto-update keeps CLI current - Better developer experience ## Scope This is CLI client-side behavior and belongs in the public repo. Depends on Premium API sync endpoints from `jeffreysprompts_premium-67o`. ## Features ### 1. Local Cache - Cache synced prompts locally - Cache authentication tokens - Cache user preferences - SQLite or JSON file storage ### 2. Offline Mode - Detect network unavailable - Serve from local cache - Queue sync operations - Show offline indicator ### 3. Auto-Update - Check for updates on launch - Download in background - Prompt to restart - Self-update mechanism ### 4. Configuration - Cache directory location - Cache size limits - Update channel (stable/beta) - Offline mode toggle ## Implementation ### Local Cache (CLI) ```ts // ~/.jeffreysprompts/cache/ interface LocalCache { prompts: Map; collections: Map; lastSync: Date; version: string; } class CacheManager { private cacheDir: string; async cachePrompt(prompt: Prompt): Promise { const path = join(this.cacheDir, 'prompts', `${prompt.id}.json`); await writeFile(path, JSON.stringify(prompt)); } async getPrompt(id: string): Promise { const path = join(this.cacheDir, 'prompts', `${id}.json`); if (!existsSync(path)) return null; return JSON.parse(await readFile(path, 'utf-8')); } async sync(): Promise { const lastSync = await this.getLastSync(); const changes = await api.getChangesSince(lastSync); // Apply changes to cache return { added: changes.added.length, updated: changes.updated.length }; } } ``` ### Offline Detection ```ts async function withOfflineSupport( onlineAction: () => Promise, offlineAction: () => Promise ): Promise { try { return await onlineAction(); } catch (error) { if (isNetworkError(error)) { console.log(chalk.yellow('Offline mode: using cached data')); return offlineAction(); } throw error; } } ``` ### Auto-Update ```ts async function checkForUpdates(): Promise { const currentVersion = getPackageVersion(); const latestVersion = await fetchLatestVersion(); if (semver.gt(latestVersion, currentVersion)) { return { current: currentVersion, latest: latestVersion, releaseNotes: await fetchReleaseNotes(latestVersion), downloadUrl: getDownloadUrl(latestVersion), }; } return null; } async function performUpdate(info: UpdateInfo): Promise { const spinner = ora('Downloading update...').start(); // Download new version const binary = await downloadBinary(info.downloadUrl); // Replace current binary await replaceBinary(binary); spinner.succeed(`Updated to v${info.latest}`); console.log('Please restart the CLI to use the new version.'); } ``` ### Config File ```yaml # ~/.jeffreysprompts/config.yaml cache: enabled: true maxSize: 100MB location: ~/.jeffreysprompts/cache updates: channel: stable # stable, beta autoCheck: true autoInstall: false offline: enabled: true queueSync: true ``` ## Files to Create (in CLI repo) - src/cache/cache-manager.ts - src/cache/offline-mode.ts - src/updates/update-checker.ts - src/updates/self-update.ts - src/config/config-manager.ts ## API Additions (Premium repo) - GET /api/cli/sync?since=timestamp - GET /api/cli/version (latest version info) ## Logging Requirements - Log offline/online detection decisions and retry/backoff - Log cache directory used and cache size accounting - Log update checks (current vs latest) and update path chosen - Log sync queue size and flush attempts when back online ## Success Criteria - Prompts accessible offline - Changes queued and synced - Auto-update notifies users - Config customizable ## Origin Moved from `jeffreysprompts_premium-e2oq`. ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:28.007456522-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:28.007456522-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-uw7z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:28.013113905-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hiff","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:28.0158326-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ctt5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:25:14.958174135-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y4l","title":"Implement jfp serve MCP server -- Details: MCP server over stdio.
